method: 3 identical requests per config: fixed technical prompt, max_tokens 1024 (all runs emitted exactly 1024), temperature 0.0, enable_thinking false; wall-clock tok/s from usage.completion_tokens. Standard 10-request short-completion benchmark was inadequate for MTP comparison (completions EOS at ~10-31 tokens; speculative overhead cannot amortize) - see the short-probe JSONs for that negative methodology result.

mtp_off.config: docker-compose.mtp-off.yml override (no --speculative-config) NOTE: prefix caching state matches between legs (engine auto-disables it with MTP on this arch; off-leg default applies).

external_reference: community-reported ~1.53x at n=3 on GB10-class Blackwell (NVIDIA forums) - consistent
notes: Prefix caching auto-disabled by the engine for the Mamba+MTP combination (matches upstream #39809 guidance).
num_speculative_tokens=3 per the model card; >3 carries known sm_120 crash/OOM reports (rtx6kpro wiki, Super-120B discussion #9).
